description_long: This object consists of a white pillar candle set atop an ornate, gold-colored candlestick holder. The candle is cylindrical with a slightly uneven top, and a visible wick protrudes from its center. The holder features a wide, round base for stability, a bulbous midsection with decorative ridges, and a flat, circular platform supporting the candle. The gold finish of the holder is distressed, giving it a vintage or antique appearance with speckled patches. The overall design is elegant and would suit both classic and urban decorative settings. The candle and holder together form a single, cohesive decorative piece.
description: A white pillar candle sits on a distressed gold candlestick holder with ornate, rounded features. The holder has a vintage look and a sturdy, wide base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the candle's slightly uneven top and the ornate, gold-speckled holder with its rounded midsection.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the candle's cylindrical shape and the full profile of the holder's decorative curves.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the candle's back and the symmetrical design of the gold holder.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the candle's wick and the consistent distressed gold finish of the holder.
